description:
**fz-dps.D2' + C2 + gate-flip**: MakeList DPS via TRMC, Term::Return under Dst, and the activation step.

This is the *consumer* that makes the C-arc observable. By the time this ticket starts, q9g.2 has the (gated) classifier, q9g.4 has Call-under-Dst, and q9g.5 has TailCall-under-Dst. This ticket adds: (1) the Return terminator's Dst lowering (C2), (2) the MakeList constructor's TRMC transform (D2'), and (3) flips the q9g.2 gate from off to on so real specs receive Dst classification.

**Why MakeList first**: cons cells are 2 words, trivial constructor surface. The recursive cons-in-result pattern `[f(h) | map(f, t)]` is the canonical TRMC target. `fixtures/list_primitives` already classifies `@dps List` on map/reverse/reverse_acc.

**Scope**:

1. **C2 — Term::Return under Dst**: when `return_reprs[my_sid] = Dst(k)`, lower `Return(v)` to `store v through dst; return`. Cont sig becomes `(dst_i64, self) -> ()` instead of `(value, self) -> ()`.

2. **D2' — MakeList DPS via TRMC**: when surrounding cont's `dst` is `Some(List)` and `MakeList` appears in result position with one tail-recursive call, transform: alloc cons cell, write head, tail-call with `&cell.tail` as callee dst. **Base case (`[]` in result position): write the empty-list sentinel (TAG_PTR | 1, bit pattern `1`) through dst — NOT `NIL_BITS`.** Post-fz-s9y `[]` and `nil` are distinct (runtime/src/fz_value.rs:43-46).

3. **Activation**: flip q9g.2's gate from off to on. The classifier's `Some(k)` outputs now reach `return_reprs`. Concurrently: at ir_codegen.rs:3023 (`fn_halt_kinds` loop), guard the insert with `if matches!(r, ArgRepr::Dst(_)) { continue; }` — Dst specs aren't spawn entries and have no halt-cont. Per the q9g.26 audit, this is the one site that breaks when the gate flips.

**Eligibility for D2'**: a MakeList in result position fires the TRMC rewrite iff the surrounding fn's own return_repr is `Dst(List)`. (Per the q9g.26 audit, eligibility reads `return_reprs[this_spec_id]` directly — no Cont.dst lookup needed. The Cont.dst field added in q9g.1 is decorative for v1 and may be retired in a later cleanup.)

**Tag-scheme note**: as-shipped fz-o0u uses TAG_PTR=0b000. Heap derefs through tagged pointers need no `untag_ptr`; q9g.24's audit confirmed clean.

**Proof fixture**: `fixtures/list_primitives` — rebless `expected.clif`. Expected delta on `reverse_acc` and `map`'s cons specs: gain `dst` parameter, lose return-path FzValue tag/untag, gain inline cell-bump + tail-call-with-dst. CLIF instruction count strictly decreases.

**Tests**: rebless list_primitives golden CLIF; all fixture-matrix paths green; clippy clean; warnings = errors. New unit test: a synthesized DPS-shaped fn's Return lowers to a store-through-dst form.

**Out of scope** (separate tickets): F0=VecI64 (q9g.7), F1=VecF64/U8/Bit (q9g.8), F2=Bitstring (q9g.9), F3=Tuple (q9g.10), F4=known-length list literals (q9g.11), D1=case-arm shared dst (q9g.6), E2 cleanup of dead emit_return uniform branch (q9g.13).

**Precondition**: q9g.5 (TailCall-under-Dst — the TRMC recursive arm requires it).

comments.text: Scope refined per user: native-path only. Uniform-path DPS deferred to fz-ag9 (CD.2).

Rewritten 2026-05-18 to (a) name Module.callsite_outcomes (fz-9pr/fz-f88) as the eligibility source for C3, (b) correct MakeList base case to empty-list sentinel (bit pattern 1) rather than NIL_BITS — post fz-s9y/fz-yan [] and nil are distinct, (c) note that the as-shipped fz-o0u (TAG_PTR=0b000) makes the q9g.24 untag concern moot.

Rewritten 2026-05-18 (second pass): scope is now C2 (Return-under-Dst) + D2' (MakeList TRMC) + flip the q9g.2 gate + rebless CLIF. C3 and C4 moved back out into their own tickets (q9g.4, q9g.5) so the C-arc lands atomically rather than as a single CD-bundle. This ticket is the activation step that makes the whole chain observable.

title: fz-dps.CD: native-path wire ABI (Return/Call/TailCall) + MakeList DPS via TRMC
